## Description of Changes
Please include a summary of the changes, the architectural problem solved, and link any related issues.

- Resolves # (issue)

## Subsystem Impacted
- [ ] UI / Jetpack Compose Components
- [ ] BLE Transceiver Controller
- [ ] Wi-Fi Direct High-Throughput Layer
- [ ] Database Persistence (Room Entities / Migrations)
- [ ] Cryptographic / Security Module

## Compliance Checklist
- [ ] My code strictly adheres to the styling guidelines in [CODING_STYLE.md](CODING_STYLE.md).
- [ ] I have verified the compilation success locally via `gradle assembleDebug`.
- [ ] I have added appropriate JVM / Robolectric tests for any new logic.
- [ ] All new user-facing strings are defined inside `res/values/strings.xml`.
- [ ] Minimum interactive components meet the 48dp Touch Target guidelines.
